root_text.an5.21:1.1: “So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu agāravo appatisso asabhāgavuttiko ‘sabrahmacārīsu ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.21:1.2: ‘Ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ aparipūretvā sekhaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.21:1.3: ‘Sekhaṁ dhammaṁ aparipūretvā sīlāni paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.21:1.4: ‘Sīlāni aparipūretvā sammādiṭṭhiṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.21:1.5: ‘Sammādiṭṭhiṁ aparipūretvā sammāsamādhiṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.21:2.1: So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sagāravo sappatisso sabhāgavuttiko ‘sabrahmacārīsu ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.21:2.2: ‘Ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ paripūretvā sekhaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.21:2.3: ‘Sekhaṁ dhammaṁ paripūretvā sīlāni paripūressatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.

translation_text.an5.21:1.1: “Mendicants, it is quite impossible for a disrespectful and irreverent mendicant with incompatible lifestyle to fulfill the practice dealing with supplementary regulations regarding their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an5.21:1.2: Without fulfilling the practice dealing with supplementary regulations, it’s impossible to fulfill the practice of a trainee.
translation_text.an5.21:1.3: Without fulfilling the practice of a trainee, it’s impossible to fulfill ethics.
translation_text.an5.21:1.4: Without fulfilling ethics, it’s impossible to fulfill right view.
translation_text.an5.21:1.5: Without fulfilling right view, it’s impossible to fulfill right immersion.
translation_text.an5.21:2.1: But it is quite possible for a respectful and reverent mendicant with compatible lifestyle to fulfill the practice dealing with supplementary regulations regarding their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an5.21:2.2: Having fulfilled the practice dealing with supplementary regulations, it’s possible to fulfill the practice of a trainee.
translation_text.an5.21:2.3: Having fulfilled the practice of a trainee, it’s possible to fulfill ethics.
translation_text.an5.21:2.4: Having fulfilled ethics, it’s possible to fulfill right view.
translation_text.an5.21:2.5: Having fulfilled right view, it’s possible to fulfill right immersion.”
